incompatibleRuntime.title: This system is not supported by the bundled backend
incompatibleRuntime.description: OpenBioScience opened, but the bundled local runtime cannot run on this Linux version. Please upgrade to a supported Linux distribution and restart OpenBioScience.

incompleteInstallation.title: OpenBioScience installation is incomplete
incompleteInstallation.description: This installation is missing required local resources, so the OpenBioScience local runtime cannot start. Please download and reinstall the latest OpenBioScience. If the issue returns after reinstalling, check whether security or antivirus software quarantined OpenBioScience components.
incompleteInstallation.runtimeComponentDescription: This installation is missing required bundled runtime components, so {{resource}} cannot start. Reinstall the latest OpenBioScience package. If it still happens after reinstalling, check whether security or antivirus software quarantined OpenBioScience components.

packageArchitectureMismatch.title: OpenBioScience package architecture mismatch
packageArchitectureMismatch.description: This OpenBioScience package is for {{packageArch}}, but this Mac is {{deviceArch}}. You may have downloaded the wrong package. Please download and install the {{expectedArch}} package.

wizard.footerHint: After web login, app setup, and authorization, OpenBioScience will return to the current collaboration page automatically.
wizard.floatingHintTitle: Sign in to use collaboration mode

web.title: Connect collaboration
web.subtitle: Open the Lark mobile app and scan the QR code.
steps: Scan the QR code on the right

auth.title: Authorize OpenBioScience
auth.subtitle: The authorization page opens on the right. Approve access with your current account, then OpenBioScience verifies it automatically.
auth.needsApp: Create or bind an app first
auth.needsAppDesc: Authorization must use the OpenBioScience app created or bound in step 2. Finish step 2 first; once an App ID is detected, OpenBioScience can continue.
auth.needsWebDesc: Finish web sign-in in step 1 so the app setup and authorization flow can use the same web session.
auth.cliMissing: lark-cli was not detected. Install the local runtime first.
auth.ready: User authorization is ready for automation.
auth.chooseProfileDesc: Choose an existing profile. OpenBioScience will save it as the collaboration automation target and generate a fresh authorization page.
auth.noProfiles: No profiles found. Create an app first.
auth.verifying: Authorization is open. Waiting for approval and automatic verification.

app.title: Create bound app
app.subtitle: Create or bind the OpenBioScience app first. Authorization will be issued through this app.
app.appNameHint: Keep this name so the app is easy to recognize in the developer console.
app.setupHint: OpenBioScience opens the setup flow directly. Use OpenBioScience as the app name; the App ID is detected automatically after setup.
app.createPanelDesc: Click the button below to enter the app creation flow directly; you do not need to search for the entry in the developer console.
app.secretDesc: The App ID is detected, but Keychain does not expose the App Secret to the UI. Paste it once to save it into Channels; it will not be shown on the page.
app.secretNeeded: Paste App Secret once to finish saving.
app.embeddedHint: The setup flow opens directly in this area.

projects.empty: No project tasks to show yet. Complete collaboration setup, then refresh to sync.
projects.agentInboxWarning: The Agent inbox is not tied to a tasklist. Choose a collaboration tasklist first.
projects.syncedTasklistsHint: Project tasks from collaboration tasklists stay synced with the web Tasks page.
projects.agentBucketHint: Automatically recognized Agent tasks, unassigned tasks, and tasks marked [Agent_Task] appear here first.
projects.leaderBoundDesc: A leader Agent startup context has been generated. Before the project owner approves the plan, the Agent may only discuss the plan and must not create or assign tasks.
projects.leaderUnboundDesc: Binding creates a planning draft and opens a new chat where the leader Agent confirms contacts, responsibilities, milestones, and acceptance criteria with the project owner.
projects.planDraftCreated: Planning draft created. The leader Agent will discuss the plan with the project owner before execution.

docs.metadataDesc: Goals, scope, task description, and acceptance criteria
docs.staffingDesc: Members, roles, reporting lines, and permission boundaries
docs.notCreated: Not created. Click to create it automatically.
docs.errorPrefix: Project source files are not synced yet: {{error}}
docs.syncFailed: Failed to sync project source files
docs.readFailed: Failed to read project source file
docs.saveFailed: Failed to save project source file
docs.placeholder: Maintain the project-level source of truth here. Saving will sync it to the collaboration Markdown file.

task.dueDirty: Changed. Click Save time on the right.
task.loadingDetail: Loading comments and attachments. Local task details are available now.
task.commentHint: Comments are synced to the collaboration task.
task.commentPlaceholder: Write a comment. It will be synced to the collaboration task comments.

projects.hideTasklistConfirm: “{{name}}” will be hidden from this device’s sidebar and project picker. By default, the remote tasklist will not be deleted.
projects.hideTasklistRemoteDeleteHint: When checked, Confirm will also delete the remote tasklist. This choice will be remembered for the next time.
projects.hideTasklistRemoteSuccess: Deleted from the sidebar and remote tasklist
projects.renameTasklistHint: Saving will update the collaboration tasklist name.
projects.renameRecordPlaceholder: Enter a new local display name
projects.deleteConversationConfirm: Delete the local conversation “{{name}}”? The collaboration tasklist and remote tasks will not be deleted.
projects.manageDescription: Create a new collaboration tasklist, or load projects that were previously removed from this device’s sidebar.
projects.projectHidden: Removed from this device’s sidebar. You can load it again.
projects.restoreTasklistSuccess: Loaded back into this device’s sidebar
projects.deleteRecordConfirm: Remove “{{name}}” from this device’s sidebar? The remote collaboration task will not be deleted.
